post.description: Validates credentials and returns an HTTP Basic token payload.
Creates a user account and returns an HTTP Basic token payload.

get.description: Returns the user authenticated by HTTP Basic credentials.
Lists vehicles owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Gets a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Aggregated vehicle data: stats, events, predictions
Lists lifecycle events for a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a lifecycle event for a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for vehicle events.

delete.description: Deletes a lifecycle event for a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates a lifecycle event for a vehicle owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns latest predictions for vehicle parts. If predictions do not exist, backend generates and stores them.
Returns the basic vehicle timeline based on lifecycle events.
Returns API liveness information and database readiness when configured.
